arts.ttl: Mark Robins appointed Stoke manager on three-and-a-half year deal
arts.sum: The former Coventry boss will take charge of his first game on Saturday against Plymouth Argyle

arts.ttl: Stoke appoint Mark Robins as third manager of season on contract to 2028
arts.sum: Robins was sacked by Coventry in November He takes over from Narcís Pelach with club 18th Mark Robins has been appointed as Stoke’s manager on a three-and-a-half-year contract. The 55-year-old was sacked in November by Coventry and will watch Stoke’s game at Burnley on Wednesday from the stands before being in the dugout for the first time at home to Plymouth on Saturday. Robins spent just over seven and a half years at Coventry and oversaw two promotions to reach the Championship. His team lost the 2022-23 Championship playoff final on penalties to Luton and were beaten in a shootout by Manchester United in last season’s FA Cup semi-finals. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Former Coventry City boss handed new job with Championship rivals
arts.sum: Announced this morning, hours before Stoke's New Year's Day fixture at Burnley, Robins is set to take his place in the stands at Turf Moor while interim manager Ryan Shawcross oversees the team. Former Coventry City boss Mark Robins has been confirmed as the new manager at Stoke City on a three-and-a-half-year deal.

arts.ttl: Stoke City appoint Mark Robins as new manager and ex-Cardiff City coach as assistant
arts.sum: Stoke City have confirmed the appointment of former Coventry City manager Mark Robins as their new boss on a three-and-a-half-year contract

arts.ttl: Stoke appoint ex-Coventry boss Robins as manager
arts.sum: Stoke City appoint former Coventry boss Mark Robins as their new manager on a three-and-a-half-year deal.

arts.ttl: Coventry City man admits desire to ‘absorb’ everything under Lampard – Not wasting opportunity with Premier League legend
arts.sum: Coventry City midfielder Victor Torp has admitted he is constantly looking to ‘absorb’ as much as he can from Frank Lampard, after watching him shine as a player in the Premier League. Tipsbladet have an interview with the Coventry midfielder today in which he heaps praise on his current manager. At the conclusion of that season, Lampard returned to Chelsea. Coventry City's manager is Frank Lampard, who was appointed last month.

arts.ttl: Preview: Cardiff City vs. Coventry City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Cardiff City and Coventry City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Key January transfer window dates for Frank Lampard and Coventry City
arts.sum: The window for English clubs opens on Wednesday January 1, 2025 – on the day the Sky Blues play Cardiff City. Frank Lampard gets his first opportunity to shape Coventry City’ s squad next month, with the January transfer window finally upon us.
